description: You are the exhibition designer for the Riverside Community Art Museum. Transform the provided residential building shell into a professional five-zone art gallery exhibition space for the 'Convergence: Modern Forms' contemporary exhibition. Your design must feature partition walls dividing the space into five functional zones (such as a Main Gallery, Secondary Gallery, Sculpture Alcove, Visitor Lounge, and Gift Shop), at least 8 display fixtures repurposed from the catalog, 6 visitor seating items, 10 lighting fixtures for illumination, and 4 text labels identifying the exhibition zones. Additionally, apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 3 rooms and include at least 3 decorative or plant items for atmosphere. Save the completed project file.
